slides.title: Tired and foggy for no reason? Check your *B12*.
slides.sub: Vitamin B12 quietly powers your energy and nerves. When it runs low, the symptoms are easy to blame on everything else.

slides.title: It runs your energy line
slides.body: B12 helps build *red blood cells and nerves*. Short on it and oxygen and signals both lag.

slides.title: Fatigue, fog, tingling
slides.body: Low B12 can show up as *deep fatigue, brain fog*, or pins-and-needles long before a blood test flags it.

slides.title: Plant-based and over 50
slides.body: B12 lives in animal foods, and absorption drops with age — so *vegans and older adults* are most exposed.

slides.title: Food first, then test
slides.body: Eggs, fish, dairy, or a *fortified food or supplement*. If symptoms linger, ask for a simple blood test.

slides.title: More isn't better
slides.body: It's water-soluble, so you pass the excess — but *fix a real deficiency* and the energy lift is real.

slides.title: Stop guessing what's *draining your energy*.
slides.body: Vibe Health logs your meals and how you feel each day — so patterns like low energy and a thin diet stop hiding from you.

caption:
Random fatigue and brain fog get blamed on everything but the obvious: low B12. 🔋

It builds red blood cells and nerves, lives in animal foods, and absorption drops with age — so plant-based eaters and over-50s are most at risk. Food first, then test. 🔖

Vibe Health logs your meals and energy so the patterns stop hiding → link in bio.
youtube_title: Tired for No Reason? Your B12 Might Be the Culprit
